creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 161934
Patch to update devel/etl, devel/synfig and graphics/synfigstudio to 1.0.2 release

The attached patch updates the following related ports to the 1.0.2 release:
graphics/synfigstudio: Update to 1.0.2
devel/synfig: Update to 1.0.2
devel/etl: Change download location, update checksum and bump PORTREVISION

Changes this release can be seen here:
http://www.synfig.org/cms/en/news/synfig-studio-102-released/
